intent: Make Codex auto-fix prioritize repairing review findings instead of stopping on recoverable patch/context/soft-audit failures.
assumptions: CODEX_AGENT_COMMAND points to the real Codex/GPT-5.5 executor.
Context mismatch, empty retry patch, and retry-generation failure are recoverable by full-file fallback.
SecurityCheck and QualityScore are soft review aids, not the user's primary goal.
risks: Full-file fallback can produce larger diffs than SEARCH/REPLACE.
Relaxed workflow mode could hide soft audit concerns unless they remain visible in comments/JSON.
Pre-push validation must remain a hard stop to avoid publishing broken code.
plan: Add red e2e coverage for context_mismatch with empty retry falling through to full-file fallback.
Add workflow-state coverage for relaxed pending behavior.
Continue to full-file fallback after empty initial patch, empty retry patch, or retry-generation failure.
Keep hard stops for protected files, checkout safety, write boundaries, and pre-push validation.
